ideation: This sequence simulates the motion of helicopter blades using the robot's arms.  The arms will rotate in a circular motion, mimicking the spinning blades.  The sequence will emphasize the dynamic movement of the arms, and the slight differences in arm positions will create the illusion of continuous rotation.  The wrists will remain neutral, keeping the focus on the arm movement. This animation will use both arms to convey the spinning motion of the helicopter blades, enhancing the visual representation of the emoji.

frames.beat: arms start still, ready to spin
both arms sweep outwards and upwards, blades begin to turn
arms cross over, blades continue their rapid rotation
arms return to rest, helicopter lands gently lands
